propositions: The auto-lander loop service must be containerized and wired into docker-compose as a single instance on the existing Gerrit box.
The service must log to its own service logs and never write to session_log.
All failure modes (hang, error, stuck-state, lander_down) must be loudly visible via metrics and alarms rather than failing silently.
Crash-safe restart and recovery must be guaranteed via autoheal sidecar, flock single-writer guard, heartbeat file, and a concrete recovery record.
A read-only HTTP status endpoint must expose heartbeat_age_s, with lander_down triggered at heartbeat age > 90s and a 15s poll freshness contract.
A stuck-state time-in-phase alarm must fire when a wipChain stays in a non-idle phase longer than 45 minutes.
